source_jobs.title: Account Manager
source_jobs.description:
Vistar Media is the home of out-of-home (OOH). As a global ad tech company and the world's largest digital out-of-home (DOOH) advertising marketplace, we offer technology designed to make buying and selling OOH media easier. Our goal is simple: to help the world's marketers leverage OOH's unique ability to motivate and delight. 

From strategic partnerships with major media owner networks to executing impactful campaigns with renowned global brands such as Nestlé, Porsche, Target, and Levi's, our team is filled with passionate, innovative, and collaborative problem solvers, engaging and entertaining consumers like you in the real world. Find your home in out-of-home - find your people at Vistar.



As of January 2025, Vistar Media was acquired by T-Mobile and is now part of T-Mobile Advertising Solutions. By combining our DOOH expertise with T-Mobile’s unique customer insights and expansive omnichannel capabilities, we’re creating new opportunities to innovate at scale and make a meaningful impact on the future of out-of-home media.

You might not realise it but digital out-of-home is all around you; from the billboards in Times Square, to the TVs at petrol pumps, screens at electric vehicle charging stations, elevators, the grocery check-out aisle and everything in between. Our mission is to power that global digital signage ecosystem. We’ve built software solutions that can run entire signage networks and an end-to-end marketplace for programmatic advertising exclusively for digital out-of-home.

About us:

Vistar Media is a rapidly expanding global software and advertising technology company. Our innovation and leadership in the industry have been recognised by AdExchanger’s Top Programmatic Power Players. We pride ourselves on our positive, supportive culture and are looking to scale our teams globally. Be a part of our exciting journey!

About the role:

We're adding to our APAC Client Success team, and are searching for experienced candidates who are looking to work with top-tier clients in a growing market. A successful candidate for this role has built collaborative client relationships; understands the digital advertising landscape; is fluent in programmatic advertising and the RTB landscape; excels in fast-paced startup environments; and has strong communication and problem-solving skills. You will report to the Senior Director of Client Success APAC and work closely with the Sales, Supply, Analytics, and Product teams to ensure client success across both managed and self-service advertising campaigns.

What you'll do:

 - Manage Vistar’s demand clients across managed and self-service buys

 - Understand the Vistar Media platform, its core product offerings, and the ability to communicate how it can meet client objectives

 - Respond to RFPs and create comprehensive media plans for existing and potential clients

 - Partner with Sales to manage client relationships and client satisfaction, including determining client goals, deliverables, asset management, and delivery to achieve campaign success

 - Grow client platform usage and improve results through training and onboarding self-service clients

 - Communicate directly with agencies, brands, DSPs, internal teams and external vendors as necessary

 - Upsell and renew existing clients with innovative ideas that focus on retention and growing business

 - Collaborate with cross-functional teams to troubleshoot technical issues and enhance product capabilities to improve and streamline user experience

 - Produce QBRs and client-facing reporting decks with insights and recommendations

What experience we're looking for:

 - Bachelor’s degree

 - 3-5 years experience working in client success role within the media or advertising industry

 - Experience with the programmatic ecosystem, RTB, DSPs, SSPs, DMPs

 - Understanding of ad tech, media buying, planning, ad operations, trafficking, and analytics

 - Proficiency working in ad platforms, ad verification, and with m

source_jobs.title: Client Success Associate (CAN)
source_jobs.description:
Vistar Media is the home of out-of-home (OOH). As a global ad tech company and the world's largest digital out-of-home (DOOH) advertising marketplace, we offer technology designed to make buying and selling OOH media easier. Our goal is simple: to help the world's marketers leverage OOH's unique ability to motivate and delight. 

From strategic partnerships with major media owner networks to executing impactful campaigns with renowned global brands such as Nestlé, Porsche, Target, and Levi's, our team is filled with passionate, innovative, and collaborative problem solvers, engaging and entertaining consumers like you in the real world. Find your home in out-of-home - find your people at Vistar.



As of January 2025, Vistar Media was acquired by T-Mobile and is now part of T-Mobile Advertising Solutions. By combining our DOOH expertise with T-Mobile’s unique customer insights and expansive omnichannel capabilities, we’re creating new opportunities to innovate at scale and make a meaningful impact on the future of out-of-home media.


ABOUT THE ROLE:

We're adding to our Client Success team, and searching for candidates with experience in digital media who are looking to grow within Client Services. This individual works well in a fast-paced startup environment, has strong communication and problem solving skills, and is eager to learn. You will report to the Director of Client Success and work closely with the Client Success team to assist in pre-sale activities and day to day campaign management across managed & self-service buys.






WHAT YOU'LL DO:

 - Assist the Client Success team in building RFPs to create comprehensive media plans for existing and potential clients

 - Partner with the Client Success team to gather assets, set-up campaigns, and monitor campaigns for performance and delivery

 - QA creative files and digital assets for DOOH & Mobile campaigns. Coordinate with Client Success to ensure creative files and tags meet specs.

 - Coordinate custom creative development with client and internal teams, overseeing the timeline and asset creation from start to finish

 - Traffic 1st and 3rd party campaigns across DOOH and mobile

 - Pull DOOH and Mobile reporting, coordinate with internal teams to resolve reporting discrepancies and meet client needs

 - Support the Client Success team with billing efforts for our clients

 - Take clear ownership of assigned projects and keep them on-track; meet all deliverables accurately and in a timely manner

 




WHAT EXPERIENCE WE’RE LOOKING FOR:

 - Bachelor’s degree

 - 1-2 years of industry experience; experience at a programmatic technology company preferred.

 - Experience working w/ Third Party Ad Servers, Verification, and Measurement Partners (DoubleClick, Sizmek, IAS, DoubleVerify, Cuebiq, Foursquare, IRI, etc.)

 - Understanding of ad operations, trafficking and analytics

 - Experience or familiarity with mobile and or location-based data

 - Highly proficient using MS office suite (Excel, Word, PowerPoint)






WHO YOU ARE:

 - Passionate about building client relationships

 - Excellent time management skills and ability to multi-task across multiple projects and stakeholders

 - Curious to learn, be a team player, and go above and beyond when needed

If you’re ambitious, highly driven, and interested in making an impact, Vistar is the place for you. Apply to join our team… we’ll see you out there.

source_jobs.title: Account Manager, DACH
source_jobs.description:
Vistar Media is the home of out-of-home (OOH). As a global ad tech company and the world's largest digital out-of-home (DOOH) advertising marketplace, we offer technology designed to make buying and selling OOH media easier. Our goal is simple: to help the world's marketers leverage OOH's unique ability to motivate and delight. 

From strategic partnerships with major media owner networks to executing impactful campaigns with renowned global brands such as Nestlé, Porsche, Target, and Levi's, our team is filled with passionate, innovative, and collaborative problem solvers, engaging and entertaining consumers like you in the real world. Find your home in out-of-home - find your people at Vistar.



As of January 2025, Vistar Media was acquired by T-Mobile and is now part of T-Mobile Advertising Solutions. By combining our DOOH expertise with T-Mobile’s unique customer insights and expansive omnichannel capabilities, we’re creating new opportunities to innovate at scale and make a meaningful impact on the future of out-of-home media.



About the role:

You will work in a dynamic environment to accelerate our business by establishing and growing the German business by supporting our team in Hamburg. Your main job is to introduce Vistar Media to potential users and assist them with questions before and after their campaigns. You'll also handle various requests about what Vistar Media can do. You'll be the main person our clients talk to, convincing them that our solution is the key to their success.



What You'll Do:

 - You will be in contact with the client on a daily basis to support the smooth running of their advertising campaigns

 - Onboard new clients with a platform run-through based on what they need from the platform and how it can benefit them

 - Consult clients on strategic plans, recommend new technology & features, and give out best practices

 - Client Health Checks: you check on your client’s engagements regularly. You make sure they get the full maximum out of the platform to achieve their goals

 - You communicate with internal teams (creative design, development) and external partners (media owners, data & tech providers) to bring our platform and the clients using it to the next level

 - Identify and build strong relationships with clients and the industry network: media owners, data partners, and other ancillary relationships

 - Being the advocate of our platform and product




What Experience We’re Looking For:

 - A degree in business, marketing or a similar field

 - You have at least 2 years of experience in a client facing role

 - You have a service-oriented attitude: the ability to build effective relationships with all sorts of partners

 - You are technology-first: keen to know the ins and outs of the digital media industry

 - You are proactive and you enjoy supporting the organization to deal with change and ambiguity in a healthy way

 - You are able to manage and prioritize tasks and projects

 - Fluency in German and English is a must

 - Understanding of digital advertising technology; programmatic, mobile, data, and attribution

 - Based in Hamburg and able to work from the office (hybrid)



Who You Are:

 - Self-motivation, the determination to succeed, and grow a small business unit within an international support framework

 - Autonomous, able to drive the development of a new business independently

 - Agility to respond to differing sales and support needs and requests, business models, and client profiles

 - Tenacity to pursue and close contracts, and ensure their execution and uptake

 - Calm under pressure and patient in communicating with people of all backgrounds

 - Confident in presenting technical and commercial solutions, and translating them across functions



What We Offer:

 - Competitive salary & Bonus scheme

 - 25 Vacation Days

 - Comprehensive Pension Scheme

 - Flexible hybrid work arrangements with access to our office in Hamburg

 - Quarterly Lifestyle Stipen

source_jobs.title: Support Engineer
source_jobs.description:
Vistar Media is the home of out-of-home (OOH). As a global ad tech company and the world's largest digital out-of-home (DOOH) advertising marketplace, we offer technology designed to make buying and selling OOH media easier. Our goal is simple: to help the world's marketers leverage OOH's unique ability to motivate and delight. 

From strategic partnerships with major media owner networks to executing impactful campaigns with renowned global brands such as Nestlé, Porsche, Target, and Levi's, our team is filled with passionate, innovative, and collaborative problem solvers, engaging and entertaining consumers like you in the real world. Find your home in out-of-home - find your people at Vistar.



As of January 2025, Vistar Media was acquired by T-Mobile and is now part of T-Mobile Advertising Solutions. By combining our DOOH expertise with T-Mobile’s unique customer insights and expansive omnichannel capabilities, we’re creating new opportunities to innovate at scale and make a meaningful impact on the future of out-of-home media.

Title: Support Engineer

Reports to: Support Engineering Team Lead



Description

The Support Engineer is responsible for resolving technical support requests for customer-impacting issues. This role involves daily frontline internal support, including issue analysis, research, testing, and resolution.

This role will work closely with the Product and Software Engineering teams to eliminate defects and improve the customer experience. An ideal candidate is curious, detail-oriented, takes ownership of their work, and drives issues to resolution. Strong Support Engineers will view customer issues as their own and operate with a sense of urgency to ensure customer satisfaction. An ideal candidate will detect patterns from incoming work and leverage their creativity to drive solutions that prevent recurring issues, thereby improving the overall support life cycle.


Key Responsibilities & Objectives

Technical Support:

● Provide technical support for incoming tickets from customers.

● Demonstrate a strong understanding of product issues, including in-depth technical analysis, troubleshooting, root cause identification, and engaging appropriate SMEs as needed for incident and problem management.

● Manage the technical on-call channel to deliver quick fixes for high-priority product issues.

● Monitor support quality metrics to help assess and improve support processes.

● Analyze previous customer cases to identify trends and pain points, driving product improvements.

● Review support tickets and provide feedback to the team, coaching them on their troubleshooting.

● Drive changes that improve support-related processes.

● Identify and address any gaps in internal tools and processes.

● Assist with team coordination and customer communications during important product launches and support events.

Collaboration:

● Work closely with the Product and Software Engineering teams to resolve issues and enhance the customer experience.

● Collaborate with team members to ensure that customer issues are addressed promptly and effectively.

● Participate in cross-functional meetings to discuss and solve complex technical problems.

Customer Focus:

● Operate with a sense of urgency to resolve customer issues, ensuring high levels of customer satisfaction.

● Take ownership of customer issues, treating them as personal challenges to be resolved.



Required Skills and Qualifications:

Technical Skills:

● Experience in troubleshooting, debugging, and resolving technical issues.

● Familiarity with at least one programming or scripting language.

● Basic understanding of web technologies.

● Basic understanding of SQL and database systems.

Customer Service Skills:

● Ability to be cordial, supportive, and empathetic in customer interactions.

● Strong communication skills, both written and verbal.

Education and Experience:

● At least 2 years of experience in a software testing, support, IT, or software

source_jobs.title: Account Executive
source_jobs.description:
Vistar Media is the home of out-of-home (OOH). As a global ad tech company and the world's largest digital out-of-home (DOOH) advertising marketplace, we offer technology designed to make buying and selling OOH media easier. Our goal is simple: to help the world's marketers leverage OOH's unique ability to motivate and delight. 

From strategic partnerships with major media owner networks to executing impactful campaigns with renowned global brands such as Nestlé, Porsche, Target, and Levi's, our team is filled with passionate, innovative, and collaborative problem solvers, engaging and entertaining consumers like you in the real world. Find your home in out-of-home - find your people at Vistar.



As of January 2025, Vistar Media was acquired by T-Mobile and is now part of T-Mobile Advertising Solutions. By combining our DOOH expertise with T-Mobile’s unique customer insights and expansive omnichannel capabilities, we’re creating new opportunities to innovate at scale and make a meaningful impact on the future of out-of-home media.


ABOUT THE ROLE

We are looking for a commercially driven Account Executive to join our growing Sales team. This role plays a critical part in connecting demand-side sales with our client service teams to ensure seamless campaign delivery and strong client outcomes.

As an Account Executive at Vistar Media, you will sit at the centre of our programmatic ecosystem, supporting the briefing, planning and delivery of digital out of home campaigns. You will work closely with Sales and Client Services to bring campaigns to life, while identifying opportunities to drive incremental revenue and performance.




KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

· Act as the conduit between Sales and Client Services to deliver campaigns efficiently and effectively

· Liaise on client briefs and translate them into actionable campaign plans

· Analyse media plans and provide thoughtful, data-led recommendations to clients and internal teams

· Support the Sales team in managing agency and client relationships

· Monitor campaign delivery and provide proactive recommendations to improve outcomes

· Deliver clear and insightful reporting to clients

· Attend client and agency meetings, contributing confidently to discussions

· Work closely with internal teams to troubleshoot and problem solve in real time

· Manage multiple campaigns and deadlines in a fast-paced environment




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

· 3+ years’ experience in a media agency or media sales environment

· Strong understanding of digital media or out of home experience is highly regarded

· Excellent communication skills with the ability to engage clients and internal stakeholders

· Strong analytical mindset with the ability to interpret data and translate it into actionable insights

· Highly organised with strong attention to detail

· Ability to problem solve and remain solutions-focused under pressure

· Comfortable working to tight timelines and managing multiple priorities

· A collaborative team player who supports the broader Sales function



WHY VISTAR MEDIA

Work at the forefront of programmatic digital out of home
Be part of a high-growth, globally connected business
Collaborate with a team that is commercially driven and solutions focused
Competitive salary and commission structure
Opportunity to grow and develop within a scaling organisation




HOW TO APPLY

If you are looking to take the next step in your media career and want to be part of a team shaping the future of programmatic out of home, we would love to hear from you.

If you’re ambitious, highly driven, and interested in making an impact, Vistar is the place for you. Apply to join our team… we’ll see you out there.

source_jobs.title: Sales Manager, Belgium
source_jobs.description:
Vistar Media is the home of out-of-home (OOH). As a global ad tech company and the world's largest digital out-of-home (DOOH) advertising marketplace, we offer technology designed to make buying and selling OOH media easier. Our goal is simple: to help the world's marketers leverage OOH's unique ability to motivate and delight. 

From strategic partnerships with major media owner networks to executing impactful campaigns with renowned global brands such as Nestlé, Porsche, Target, and Levi's, our team is filled with passionate, innovative, and collaborative problem solvers, engaging and entertaining consumers like you in the real world. Find your home in out-of-home - find your people at Vistar.



As of January 2025, Vistar Media was acquired by T-Mobile and is now part of T-Mobile Advertising Solutions. By combining our DOOH expertise with T-Mobile’s unique customer insights and expansive omnichannel capabilities, we’re creating new opportunities to innovate at scale and make a meaningful impact on the future of out-of-home media.




ABOUT THE ROLE:

We are looking for a highly motivated sales professional to join our Demand Sales team and play a pivotal role in driving the growth of DSP (Demand-Side Platform) revenue within the dynamic EMEA region. In this role, you will be instrumental in fostering partnerships across media agencies and brands, making a significant impact on the digital advertising landscape.




WHAT YOU'LL DO:

 - Grow DSP revenue in the Belgium market, through self and managed service partnerships across media agencies and brands

 - Proactively source and develop a pipeline of potential clients

 - Drive uptake of the platform and engagement from buyers of digital advertising and programmatic traders, and ensure seamless ability to transact

 - Identify incremental opportunities with independent trading desks, brands and boutique agencies who may be new to OOH, as well as traditional OOH buyers

 - Provide training and support on the digital OOH industry and trading model, ensuring the media model and metrics are understood, and OOH can be easily incorporated into digital deals

 - Develop strong industry networks and represent the company as required in-market and at events




WHAT EXPERIENCE WE’RE LOOKING FOR:

 - 2-4 years of relevant experience

 - Understanding of digital advertising technology and trading; programmatic, mobile, audio, data, currency tracking and attribution

 - Experience in solutions sales in digital advertising and track record of building a business from scratch

 - Besides English must speak on of the local languages: Dutch (preferred) and/or French




WHO YOU ARE:

 - Intrinsic drive, an unwavering commitment to achieving success, and the ability to nurture a small business division within a global support structure

 - Independent and self-reliant, capable of spearheading the creation of new business opportunities and sales initiatives

 - Composed in high-stress situations and adept at communicating with individuals from diverse backgrounds

 - Confident in delivering presentations on technical, product, and business solutions




WHAT WE OFFER:

 - Competitive salary & Commission Structure

 - 25 Vacation Days

 - Comprehensive Pension Scheme

 - Quarterly Lifestyle allowance

 - Continuous Learning Opportunities



If you’re ambitious, highly driven, and interested in making an impact, Vistar is the place for you. Apply to join our team… we’ll see you out there.

source_jobs.title: Senior Corporate Legal Counsel
source_jobs.description:
Vistar Media is the home of out-of-home (OOH). As a global ad tech company and the world's largest digital out-of-home (DOOH) advertising marketplace, we offer technology designed to make buying and selling OOH media easier. Our goal is simple: to help the world's marketers leverage OOH's unique ability to motivate and delight. 

From strategic partnerships with major media owner networks to executing impactful campaigns with renowned global brands such as Nestlé, Porsche, Target, and Levi's, our team is filled with passionate, innovative, and collaborative problem solvers, engaging and entertaining consumers like you in the real world. Find your home in out-of-home - find your people at Vistar.



As of January 2025, Vistar Media was acquired by T-Mobile and is now part of T-Mobile Advertising Solutions. By combining our DOOH expertise with T-Mobile’s unique customer insights and expansive omnichannel capabilities, we’re creating new opportunities to innovate at scale and make a meaningful impact on the future of out-of-home media.


SENIOR CORPORATE LEGAL COUNSEL – T-ADS (AD-TECH AND MEDIA SOLUTIONS)

Are you looking for a work environment that encourages teamwork and where you are respected, supported, challenged, and can grow and advance your career? If your answer is “yes,” you should join T-Mobile’s All-Star Legal Team!



The Sr. Corporate Counsel – T-Ads will serve as a key legal partner to T-Mobile’s ad-tech and media solutions business, providing strategic, business-focused guidance on complex commercial transactions and emerging ad-tech matters. This role supports a fast-growing, innovative business unit by structuring and negotiating sophisticated agreements, enabling scalable deal processes, and balancing risk with speed to market. The ideal candidate is a pragmatic, solutions-oriented solicitor who thrives in a dynamic environment and collaborates effectively across cross-functional teams to drive business success.




WHAT YOU’LL DO IN YOUR ROLE.

• Collaborate with internal business clients to structure deals, solve problems, and keep initiatives moving.

• Provide practical, business-first legal guidance so teams can move quickly while appropriately managing risk.

• Build scalable deal approaches - including playbooks, templates, and negotiation strategies to enable repeatable, efficient deal flow.

• Drive process improvements within T-Ads legal support to increase speed, clarity, and consistency.

• Advise a growing business unit on complex contractual relationships with media owners, brands, advertising agencies, and ad tech partners.

• Negotiate, draft, and revise complex commercial agreements.

• Serve as a trusted advisor to internal business clients across cross-functional teams.

• Counsel business clients on emerging issues in ad tech and digital media as the business evolves.




THE EXPERIENCE YOU’LL BRING

• 7-10 years’ experience as a transactional solicitor, with relevant in-house and/or top law firm experience.

• Experience supporting areas such as ad tech, advertising, marketing, media, and negotiating with advertising agencies and brands for the placement of advertisements (preferred but not required).

• Qualified solicitor admitted to the Roll of Solicitors in England and Wales, holding (or eligible to hold) a valid SRA Practising Certificate; strong academic credentials from a recognised university.

• Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with executive maturity and the ability to interact effectively with senior leadership.

• Strong analytical, drafting, and decision-making skills, with a keen business sense and sound judgment.

• Ability to manage multiple matters and priorities in a fast-paced, evolving environment; work efficiently, meet goals, and deliver high-quality work product with impeccable attention to detail.

• Ability to work independently on day-to-day matters while escalating issues appropriately, and to collaborate effectively across the business with div

source_jobs.title: Senior Account Executive
source_jobs.description:
Vistar Media is the home of out-of-home (OOH). As a global ad tech company and the world's largest digital out-of-home (DOOH) advertising marketplace, we offer technology designed to make buying and selling OOH media easier. Our goal is simple: to help the world's marketers leverage OOH's unique ability to motivate and delight. 

From strategic partnerships with major media owner networks to executing impactful campaigns with renowned global brands such as Nestlé, Porsche, Target, and Levi's, our team is filled with passionate, innovative, and collaborative problem solvers, engaging and entertaining consumers like you in the real world. Find your home in out-of-home - find your people at Vistar.



As of January 2025, Vistar Media was acquired by T-Mobile and is now part of T-Mobile Advertising Solutions. By combining our DOOH expertise with T-Mobile’s unique customer insights and expansive omnichannel capabilities, we’re creating new opportunities to innovate at scale and make a meaningful impact on the future of out-of-home media.




ABOUT THE ROLE:

Our Demand sales team is responsible for growing our advertiser roster. We do this by partnering with brand and agency buyers to help them solve their marketing needs by using Vistar's unique technology. As a Senior Account Executive, you'll act as an ambassador of the company, evangelizing our technology solutions and differentiators, and get potential and current clients excited about working with us. You will be working directly with leaders of the business to drive revenue and lead client relationships.




WHAT YOU'LL DO:

 - Develop prospect hit lists, and leverage existing sales relationships to maximize overall long-term value of Vistar's agency and brand relationships

 - Respond to campaign opportunities and proposals from existing and new potential clients across several verticals

 - Manage key client relationships (strategic and day-to-day) across all demand lines of business including Vistar Managed Service, Vistar Self-Service as well as omni-channel DSP partnerships

 - Work closely with the Account Management, Analytics and Product teams to understand client's success metrics and growth opportunities

 - Master the programmatic OOH industry and space
   
   


WHAT EXPERIENCE WE'RE LOOKING FOR:

 - Bachelor's degree.

 - A minimum of 3-6 years of ad-tech sales experience, working with brands / agencies / trading desks / ad networks.

 - Strong relationships with local agencies and brands.

 - Experience or familiarity with programmatic, mobile and or location based data.

 - Solid understanding of exchanges, DSPs, SSPs.
   
   


WHO YOU ARE:

 - Think outside the box / be highly creative

 - Be willing to learn new technologies

 - Self-motivated and proactive.

 - Excellent communication skills.

 - Thrive in fast-paced environments.

 - Positive attitude and passionate about their work.




WHAT WE OFFER:

 - Flexible, fun start-up environment and culture

 - An approachable and accessible C-Suite

 - Comprehensive health benefits

 - A flexible hybrid work environment, with a fully stocked kitchen, weekly catered lunches, and casual attire while in office

 - Sponsored Volunteer Events and Vistar Gives Back program



At Vistar Media, we carefully consider a wide range of factors, including experience, skills, and other relevant business considerations. These considerations can cause compensation to vary. Please note that the salary range information that follows is a good faith estimate for this position. The salary range estimate for this position as performed in New York City is $100,900 - $181,900, plus bonus potential, comprehensive health benefits, and 401k with company match. The salary range for this position as performed outside of New York City may vary. The actual pay will be at Vistar Media’s sole discretion, and determined by factors including but not limited to geographic location, skills, qualifications, and experience.

If you’re ambitious,

source_jobs.title: Account Executive
source_jobs.description:
Vistar Media is the home of out-of-home (OOH). As a global ad tech company and the world's largest digital out-of-home (DOOH) advertising marketplace, we offer technology designed to make buying and selling OOH media easier. Our goal is simple: to help the world's marketers leverage OOH's unique ability to motivate and delight. 

From strategic partnerships with major media owner networks to executing impactful campaigns with renowned global brands such as Nestlé, Porsche, Target, and Levi's, our team is filled with passionate, innovative, and collaborative problem solvers, engaging and entertaining consumers like you in the real world. Find your home in out-of-home - find your people at Vistar.



As of January 2025, Vistar Media was acquired by T-Mobile and is now part of T-Mobile Advertising Solutions. By combining our DOOH expertise with T-Mobile’s unique customer insights and expansive omnichannel capabilities, we’re creating new opportunities to innovate at scale and make a meaningful impact on the future of out-of-home media.


ABOUT THE ROLE

We are looking for a commercially driven Account Executive to join our growing Sales team. This role plays a critical part in connecting demand-side sales with our client service teams to ensure seamless campaign delivery and strong client outcomes.

As an Account Executive at Vistar Media, you will sit at the centre of our programmatic ecosystem, supporting the briefing, planning and delivery of digital out of home campaigns. You will work closely with Sales and Client Services to bring campaigns to life, while identifying opportunities to drive incremental revenue and performance.




KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

· Act as the conduit between Sales and Client Services to deliver campaigns efficiently and effectively

· Liaise on client briefs and translate them into actionable campaign plans

· Analyse media plans and provide thoughtful, data-led recommendations to clients and internal teams

· Support the Sales team in managing agency and client relationships

· Monitor campaign delivery and provide proactive recommendations to improve outcomes

· Deliver clear and insightful reporting to clients

· Attend client and agency meetings, contributing confidently to discussions

· Work closely with internal teams to troubleshoot and problem solve in real time

· Manage multiple campaigns and deadlines in a fast-paced environment




WHAT WE’RE LOOKING FOR

· 3+ years’ experience in a media agency or media sales environment

· Strong understanding of digital media or out of home experience is highly regarded

· Excellent communication skills with the ability to engage clients and internal stakeholders

· Strong analytical mindset with the ability to interpret data and translate it into actionable insights

· Highly organised with strong attention to detail

· Ability to problem solve and remain solutions-focused under pressure

· Comfortable working to tight timelines and managing multiple priorities

· A collaborative team player who supports the broader Sales function




WHY VISTAR MEDIA

Work at the forefront of programmatic digital out of home
Be part of a high-growth, globally connected business
Collaborate with a team that is commercially driven and solutions focused
Competitive salary and commission structure
Opportunity to grow and develop within a scaling organisation




HOW TO APPLY

If you are looking to take the next step in your media career and want to be part of a team shaping the future of programmatic out of home, we would love to hear from you.

If you’re ambitious, highly driven, and interested in making an impact, Vistar is the place for you. Apply to join our team… we’ll see you out there.

As of January 2025, Vistar Media was acquired by T-Mobile and is now part of T-Mobile Advertising Solutions. By combining our DOOH expertise with T-Mobile’s unique customer insights and expansive omnichannel capabilities, we’re creating new opportunities to innovate at scale and make a meaningful impact on the future of out-of-home media.


ABOUT THE ROLE:

We are looking for a highly motivated Sales professional to join our Demand Sales team and play a pivotal role in driving the growth of DSP (Demand-Side Platform) revenue within the dynamic Nordic region. In this role, you will be instrumental in fostering partnerships across media agencies and brands, significantly impacting the digital advertising landscape.






WHAT YOU'LL DO:

 - Sales: Help expand our DSP (Demand-Side Platform) revenue in the Nordic markets by developing and expanding partnerships with media agencies and brands to contribute to revenue growth.

 - Platform Familiarization: Gain familiarity with our platform and assist in encouraging digital advertising buyers and programmatic traders to engage with it. Help ensure the seamless transaction process for our platform users.

 - Opportunity Research: Identify potential opportunities within the Nordic region, focusing on independent trading desks, brands, and boutique agencies that may be new to Out-of-Home (OOH) advertising. Collaborate with senior team members to explore incremental opportunities with traditional OOH buyers.

 - Training Assistance: Provide basic support in offering training and assistance to stakeholders on the digital OOH industry and trading model. Help stakeholders understand the fundamentals of the media model and metrics, making it easier to integrate OOH into digital advertising deals.

 - Network Building: Build an industry network Nordic region, represent our company at events, and build brand presence and awareness in the market.






WHAT EXPERIENCE WE’RE LOOKING FOR:

 - 3+ years of applicable experience or a background in sales positions

 - Comprehension of digital advertising technology

 - Introductory familiarity with Out-of-Home (OOH) media and advertising, along with a readiness to expand your knowledge in this domain

 - Skill in establishing and nurturing client relationships, showcasing retention and expansion strategies

 - Besides English preferably speak the local language: Swedish or Norwegian






WHO YOU ARE:

 - Intrinsic drive, an unwavering commitment to achieving success, and the ability to nurture a small business division within a global support structure

 - Independent and self-reliant, capable of spearheading the creation of new business opportunities and sales initiatives

 - Composed in high-stress situations and adept at communicating with individuals from diverse backgrounds

 - Confident in delivering presentations on technical, product, and business solutions






WHAT WE OFFER:

 - Competitive salary & Commission Structure

 - 25 Vacation Days

 - Comprehensive Pension Scheme

 - Flexible hybrid work arrangements with access to our office in Stockholm

 - Opportunity to join a fast-growing Nordic team who are motivated but also happy to have a drink after work

 - Global Employee Exchange Program

 - Continuous Learning Opportunities

If you’re am

source_jobs.title: Client Success Coordinator
source_jobs.description:
Vistar Media is the home of out-of-home (OOH). As a global ad tech company and the world's largest digital out-of-home (DOOH) advertising marketplace, we offer technology designed to make buying and selling OOH media easier. Our goal is simple: to help the world's marketers leverage OOH's unique ability to motivate and delight. 

From strategic partnerships with major media owner networks to executing impactful campaigns with renowned global brands such as Nestlé, Porsche, Target, and Levi's, our team is filled with passionate, innovative, and collaborative problem solvers, engaging and entertaining consumers like you in the real world. Find your home in out-of-home - find your people at Vistar.



As of January 2025, Vistar Media was acquired by T-Mobile and is now part of T-Mobile Advertising Solutions. By combining our DOOH expertise with T-Mobile’s unique customer insights and expansive omnichannel capabilities, we’re creating new opportunities to innovate at scale and make a meaningful impact on the future of out-of-home media.

About the role:

A successful candidate for this role has a high level understanding of the digital advertising landscape and previous experience working in client services/account management. This individual works well in a fast paced startup environment, has strong communication and problem solving skills, and is curious to learn. You will report to the APAC Senior Director of Client Success, and work closely with the Client Success team to assist in pre-sale activities and day-to-day campaign delivery and management across managed service & self service digital out-of-home (DOOH) campaigns.




WHAT YOU’LL DO:

 - Assist the Client Success and Sales teams with creating comprehensive media plans for existing and potential clients.

 - Partner with the Client Success team to gather creative assets, set-up campaigns, create creative mock-ups/imagery, and monitor campaign performance and delivery pacing.

 - QA creative files/assets for DOOH campaigns. Coordinate with Client Success to ensure all assets meet the required specifications.

 - Coordinate custom creative development with client and internal teams, overseeing the timeline and asset creation from start to finish.

 - Traffic DOOH campaigns.

 - Manage campaign reporting. Coordinate with internal teams to resolve reporting discrepancies and meet client needs.

 - Support the Client Success team with monthly billing and invoicing cycles.

 - Take clear ownership of assigned projects and keep them on-track; meet all deliverables accurately and in a timely manner.


WHAT EXPERIENCE WE’RE LOOKING FOR:

 - Bachelor’s degree

 - 0-2 year of industry experience; experience at a programmatic technology company preferred

 - Experience working w/ third party ad serving technology, verification, and measurement partners (DoubleClick, Sizmek, Foursquare, Lifesight, Dynata, Toluna, Pure Profile, etc)

 - Understanding of ad operations, trafficking and analytics.

 - Experience or familiarity with mobile and/or location-based data (Foursquare, Eyeota, HYP, Adsquare, etc)

 - Highly proficient using MS office suite (excel, word, powerpoint)


WHO YOU ARE:

 - Passionate about building client relationships.

 - Excellent time management skills and ability to multi-task across multiple projects and stakeholders.

 - Curious to learn, be a team player, and go above and beyond when needed.

If you’re ambitious, highly driven, and interested in making an impact, Vistar is the place for you. Apply to join our team… we’ll see you out there.

source_jobs.description:
Vistar Media is the home of out-of-home (OOH). As a global ad tech company and the world's largest digital out-of-home (DOOH) advertising marketplace, we offer technology designed to make buying and selling OOH media easier. Our goal is simple: to help the world's marketers leverage OOH's unique ability to motivate and delight. 

From strategic partnerships with major media owner networks to executing impactful campaigns with renowned global brands such as Nestlé, Porsche, Target, and Levi's, our team is filled with passionate, innovative, and collaborative problem solvers, engaging and entertaining consumers like you in the real world. Find your home in out-of-home - find your people at Vistar.



As of January 2025, Vistar Media was acquired by T-Mobile and is now part of T-Mobile Advertising Solutions. By combining our DOOH expertise with T-Mobile’s unique customer insights and expansive omnichannel capabilities, we’re creating new opportunities to innovate at scale and make a meaningful impact on the future of out-of-home media.


About the role:
We're adding to our Client Success team, and are searching for experienced candidates who are looking to work with top-tier clients in a growing market. A successful candidate for this role has built collaborative client relationships; understands the digital advertising landscape; is fluent in programmatic advertising and the RTB landscape; excels in fast-paced startup environments; and has strong communication and problem-solving skills. You will report to the Director of Client Success and work closely with the Sales, Supply, Analytics, and Product teams to ensure client success across both managed and self-service advertising campaigns.





What you'll do:

 - Manage Vistar’s demand clients across managed and self-service buys.

 - Understand the Vistar Media platform, its core product offerings, and the ability to communicate how it can meet client objectives.

 - Respond to RFPs and create comprehensive media plans for existing and potential clients.

 - Partner with Sales to manage client relationships and client satisfaction, including determining client goals, deliverables, asset management, and delivery to achieve campaign success.

 - Grow client platform usage and improve results through training and onboarding self-service clients.  

 - Communicate directly with agencies, brands, DSPs, internal teams and external vendors as necessary.

 - Upsell and renew existing clients with innovative ideas that focus on retention and growing business.

 - Collaborate with cross-functional teams to troubleshoot technical issues and enhance product capabilities to improve and streamline user experience.



What experience we're looking for:

 - Bachelor’s degree

 - 3-5 years experience working in client success role within the media or advertising industry.

 - Experience with the programmatic ecosystem, RTB, DSPs, SSPs, DMPs.

 - Understanding of ad tech, media buying, planning, ad operations, trafficking, and analytics.

 - Proficiency working in ad platforms, ad verification, and with measurement partners such as DCM, Sizmek, Salesforce, IAS, DoubleVerify, MOAT, Nielsen, Millward Brown, ResearchNow, etc.



Who you are:

 - Positive attitude and passion about your work

 - Passionate about building client relationships 

 - Excellent time management skills and ability to multi-task across multiple projects and stakeholders

 - Thrive in fast-paced environments



What we offer:

 - A positive work culture and a dynamic team environment

 - Comprehensive health benefits

 - RRSP contribution + matching

 - An approachable and accessible C-Suite

 - Life Insurance, Short term & Long term disability

 - Company-wide and team-specific entertainment budgets for both in-person and virtual team building 

 - Life Insurance, Short term & Long term disability

 - Other voluntary plans



If you’re ambitious, highly driven, and interested in making an impact, Vistar is the place for you

source_jobs.title: Senior Corporate Legal Counsel
source_jobs.description:
Vistar Media is the home of out-of-home (OOH). As a global ad tech company and the world's largest digital out-of-home (DOOH) advertising marketplace, we offer technology designed to make buying and selling OOH media easier. Our goal is simple: to help the world's marketers leverage OOH's unique ability to motivate and delight. 

From strategic partnerships with major media owner networks to executing impactful campaigns with renowned global brands such as Nestlé, Porsche, Target, and Levi's, our team is filled with passionate, innovative, and collaborative problem solvers, engaging and entertaining consumers like you in the real world. Find your home in out-of-home - find your people at Vistar.



As of January 2025, Vistar Media was acquired by T-Mobile and is now part of T-Mobile Advertising Solutions. By combining our DOOH expertise with T-Mobile’s unique customer insights and expansive omnichannel capabilities, we’re creating new opportunities to innovate at scale and make a meaningful impact on the future of out-of-home media.


SENIOR CORPORATE LEGAL COUNSEL - T-ADS (AD-TECH AND MEDIA SOLUTIONS)

Are you looking for a work environment that encourages teamwork and where you are respected, supported, challenged, and can grow and advance your career? If your answer is “yes,” you should join T-Mobile’s All-Star Legal Team!

The Sr. Corporate Counsel – T-Ads will serve as a key legal partner to T-Mobile’s ad-tech and media solutions business, providing strategic, business-focused guidance on complex commercial transactions and emerging ad-tech matters. This role supports a fast-growing, innovative business unit by structuring and negotiating sophisticated agreements, enabling scalable deal processes, and balancing risk with speed to market. The ideal candidate is a pragmatic, solutions-oriented lawyer who thrives in a dynamic environment and collaborates effectively across cross-functional teams to drive business success.




WHAT YOU’LL DO IN YOUR ROLE.

• Collaborate with internal business clients to structure deals, solve problems, and keep initiatives moving.

• Provide practical, business-first legal guidance so teams can move quickly while appropriately managing risk.

• Build scalable deal approaches - including playbooks, templates, and negotiation strategies to enable repeatable, efficient deal flow.

• Drive process improvements within T-Ads legal support to increase speed, clarity, and consistency.

• Advise a growing business unit on complex contractual relationships with media owners, brands, advertising agencies, and ad tech partners.

• Negotiate, draft, and revise complex commercial agreements.

• Serve as a trusted advisor to internal business clients across cross-functional teams.

• Counsel business clients on emerging issues in ad tech and digital media as the business evolves.




THE EXPERIENCE YOU’LL BRING

• 7-10 years’ experience as a transactional lawyer, with relevant in-house and/or top law firm experience.

• Experience supporting areas such as ad tech, advertising, marketing, media, and negotiating with advertising agencies and brands for the placement of advertisements (preferred but not required).

• Law degree from a recognised university with strong academic credentials; Singapore-qualified lawyer (Advocate and Solicitor) preferred, or equivalent qualification (UK, US, or other common law jurisdiction) with relevant APAC in-house experience. No practising certificate required for this in-house role.

• Excellent written and verbal communication skills, with executive maturity and the ability to interact effectively with senior leadership.

• Strong analytical, drafting, and decision-making skills, with a keen business sense and sound judgment.

• Ability to manage multiple matters and priorities in a fast-paced, evolving environment; work efficiently, meet goals, and deliver high-quality work product with impeccable attention to detail.

• Ability to work independently on day-to-day matters

source_jobs.title: Account Director
source_jobs.description:
Vistar Media is the home of out-of-home (OOH). As a global ad tech company and the world's largest digital out-of-home (DOOH) advertising marketplace, we offer technology designed to make buying and selling OOH media easier. Our goal is simple: to help the world's marketers leverage OOH's unique ability to motivate and delight. 

From strategic partnerships with major media owner networks to executing impactful campaigns with renowned global brands such as Nestlé, Porsche, Target, and Levi's, our team is filled with passionate, innovative, and collaborative problem solvers, engaging and entertaining consumers like you in the real world. Find your home in out-of-home - find your people at Vistar.



As of January 2025, Vistar Media was acquired by T-Mobile and is now part of T-Mobile Advertising Solutions. By combining our DOOH expertise with T-Mobile’s unique customer insights and expansive omnichannel capabilities, we’re creating new opportunities to innovate at scale and make a meaningful impact on the future of out-of-home media.


ABOUT THE ROLE

We are expanding our Tokyo-based team with strategic hires focused on managing and growing our core business across Japan. You will join Vistar Media at a pivotal moment, working with regional leadership to drive revenue and lead client relationships in one of the world's most sophisticated OOH markets.

Vistar Media is looking for an experienced Account Director to accelerate our growth in Japan. Reporting to the Country Manager, you will establish and nurture deep working relationships with major domestic agencies, global trading desks, and local data partners to solidify the Vistar brand.

The ideal candidate understands the nuances of the Japanese agency model and can navigate the complexities of both traditional out of home and programmatic media buying. You should be a self-starter comfortable with an entrepreneurial environment, prepared to build a business from the ground up while maintaining Vistar’s global culture of innovation and transparency.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

● Expand our advertiser client portfolio by building high-trust relationships with Japan’s Holding Companies independent shops, and direct brands.

● Maintain and adapt media kits, presentations, and marketing materials to ensure they resonate with the Japanese market standards.

● Develop targeted "hit lists" and leverage existing networks to maximize the long-term value of client partnerships.

● Raise demand-side awareness of Vistar Media as the leading global exchange for Digital Out-of-Home (DOOH), specifically educating the market on programmatic benefits.

● Leverage global MSAs while navigating local trading desk relationships to grow clientele and secure long-term partnerships.

● Work closely with Client Services to respond to RFPs, ensuring all client communications meet the high service standards expected in Japan.

● Partner with the Analytics team to translate client KPIs into comprehensive measurement strategies that prove ROI in the local context.

● Act as the primary point of contact for key clients, managing the relationship from pre-sale strategy through to post-campaign analysis.




WHAT EXPERIENCE WE’RE LOOKING FOR

● 5+ years of experience in a client-facing role within the Japanese media, ad-tech, or digital advertising industry.

● Native-level fluency in Japanese and preferably professional proficiency in English to collaborate with our global headquarters.

● A deep understanding of the Japan DOOH landscape and the programmatic ecosystem.

● Proven track record of establishing trust-based relationships with senior stakeholders at major agencies and brands.

● Strong command of Excel and PowerPoint for data-driven storytelling.

● Bachelor’s degree or equivalent professional experience.




WHO YOU ARE

● A self-starter excited by the challenge of scaling a global tech brand within the unique Japanese business environment.

● Able to bridge the gap between a fast-paced US-headquarter

notes: Mostly sales and account management roles, with a few corporate and support roles.
